block_01: With the present e-mail, we hereby inform you of the termination of your Agreement with the Company, effective immediately, in accordance with the Company’s Terms and Conditions, as the Company has determined and/or the Company has reasonable grounds to believe that you have not reached the age of maturity in the country which you are resident or citizen. Pursuant to the aforementioned reason, the Company is entitled to withhold any profit generated by you and terminate your account immediately.
block_02: Moreover, any open positions maintained in your trading account shall be effectively closed by the Company,  as per the applicable Agreement; it should be noted that the Company will not be held liable for any losses incurred on your account. For any applicable fees, please refer to the Company’s General Fees Policy.
block_03: Your trading account will be permanently closed within ten (10) days from the receipt of this notification and in case of open position(s), they shall expire on 4th day from the date of this notification therefore, we urge you to withdraw any remaining deposited funds (if available) in your trading account following the closure of your position(s).
block_04: Lastly, it should be noted that the Company hereby forbids you to create any additional and/or new trading account(s) and you shall not and/or cannot attempt to open new trading accounts with the Company, before you reach the appropriate legal age in your country. Following this letter, if the Company identifies that you have created any additional trading account(s), the Company shall be entitled to without giving prior notice to terminate the Agreement immediately, close all open positions, block the account(s), and return any remaining own funds (if applicable) excluding profits. The Company shall have no liability and no obligation to pay any profit for the aforementioned reasons.
